description: Migrate the core message broker from Apache Kafka 2.8 to Kafka 3.7+ to eliminate vulnerabilities and ensure compatibility with the new KRaft consensus protocol.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the current Kafka version is 2.8 WHEN the migration to 3.7+ is completed THEN all services should function without errors and vulnerabilities should be resolved.

description: Evaluate and plan migration from VendorX's proprietary ETL SDK to open-source alternatives to mitigate financial risks.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the current reliance on VendorX's SDK WHEN the migration plan is executed THEN the platform should operate without the proprietary SDK and maintain performance.

description: Upgrade all pipeline worker services from Python 3.9 to Python 3.12 to ensure continued support and security updates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the current Python version is 3.9 WHEN the migration to 3.12 is completed THEN all pipeline workers should function without errors.

description: Migrate from a single-region Redis cluster to a multi-region caching solution to improve performance and reduce latency for global customers.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the current caching solution is single-region WHEN the migration to a multi-region solution is completed THEN latency for global customers should be reduced to below 100ms.

description: Establish monitoring and alerting for critical CVEs to ensure timely responses to security vulnerabilities.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place WHEN a critical CVE is identified THEN an alert should be sent to the security team within 1 hour.

description: Create a centralized overview of all dependencies, including versions, EOL dates, and known CVEs to facilitate proactive management.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the centralized view is implemented WHEN a dependency is updated THEN the dashboard should reflect the new information immediately.

description: Build a centralized dashboard to monitor dependency health and integrate automated alerts for EOL and CVE issues.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dashboard is implemented WHEN a dependency reaches EOL or has a CVE THEN an alert should be generated and sent to the engineering team.

description: Run an experiment to assess the impact of resolving critical CVEs on platform performance and user satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the CVE resolutions are implemented WHEN the experiment is conducted THEN user satisfaction should show a measurable improvement.

story_title: User Feedback Collection for CVE Resolutions Implementation
description: Establish a mechanism for collecting user feedback post-CVE resolution to assess impact on user satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is in place WHEN a CVE is resolved THEN at least 50% of users should provide feedback within 2 weeks.

story_title: Eliminate vendor lock-in on proprietary transformation engine
description: The data transformation layer relies on VendorX's proprietary ETL SDK ($180K/year license). VendorX was acquired last quarter and the new parent company announced a 3x price increase effective January 2026. Need to evaluate open-source alternatives (Apache Beam, dbt, custom Flink jobs) and plan migration off the proprietary SDK.
